violations.description: Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Utensil was not suitable or dispensed effectively for self-service operations of ready-to-eat foods. -Using single use portion cups as scoops in coffee.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Ziploc bag of taco soup thawing in pan of water at prep table.

Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of. -Facility vacuum seals raw meat without a HAACP plan in place. *Observed vacuum sealed buffalo burger and beef steaks on site.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Damaged/hanging gasket at stainless freezer at end of cook line. -Damaged doors/gaskets at freezers in dry storage.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Bar Sani Sink found at less than 200ppm Quat (107F). *Used 1 tab to ~2 gallons of Water. *COS to 200-300ppm-Added 2 more tabs to solution.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical ware washing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Dishwasher found at 0ppm. COS to 50ppm, primed line and re-ran cycle.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Utensils at prep table are not stored inverted.--Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in the proper location to protect from contamination. -Coffee cups are stored on thin shelf liner not well protected from spills at server station.

Prep/vegetable sink. — --Designated prep sink was not provided or not used for food items requiring washing/soaking. *Facility preps fresh tomatoes lettuce and other vegetables as needed. *Facility has batch frozen items that end up thawing in pan of water.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not maintained in good repair. -Floors in kitchen are worn cement. -Walls behind dish pit have peeling/worn paint.
